turns.safety_veto_reason: CATEGORY 1 — Compliance-only interest pattern. Party B meets both criteria: (a) accumulated interests contain NO independent substantive content—all three entries are explicitly marked 'UNKNOWN' or 'possible' reactive interpretations, with no original value expression across six turns of participation; (b) Party B has had multiple opportunities to speak (T4, T6) and has not initiated any content independently. The 'understanding' mentioned at T4 could have been an independent interest but was immediately retracted with self-doubt rather than articulated. This is not normal responsive mediation behavior—this is a pattern where one party has only demonstrated compliance with the other party's framing without ever stating what they need or want from the resolution.
